emails.subject: European Physical Power
emails.body: European Physical Power I'm just sitting here worrying about one of my side deals with Frank, so just to reiterate a global shut down (like-no one does Credit Derivatives unless we really mean it), no non-European based counterparty (in all probability, no counterparty originating from U.S. Credit) should be approved to trade European physical power products. They have licensing requirements similar to our FERC licensing. Thanks!

emails.subject: Re: European Physical Power
emails.body: Re: European Physical Power To ease your mind, Stephanie said that this is on her "block out" list..... no worries. From: Tana Jones on 12/08/2000 01:44 PM
